topStories.title: HSBC drops 'overweight' call on EM equities on AI spending fears
topStories.summary: HSBC has reassessed its position on emerging markets equities, shifting to an 'overweight' stance due to rising volatility in Asian markets and ongoing concerns about AI-related expenditures. South Korean stocks have notably suffered, dipping into bear market conditions. Investors are growing wary of the sustainability of AI investments backed by debt. Meanwhile, HSBC has raised the rating on eurozone equities to 'overweight,' highlighting favorable market factors.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Henry Singleton: "Our accounting is set to maximize cash flow, not reported earnings. Smoothing reported earnings just has to take a backseat"
topStories.summary: Henry Singleton emphasized cash flow over reported earnings for business success. Sustainable businesses generate strong cash, not just accounting profits. Management should focus on economic value, not quarterly earnings targets. Investors gain deeper insights by examining operating and free cash flow. Cash generation remains the essential lifeblood of any business.

India's 10-year bond logs worst day in 3 months on faltering Iran deal
topStories.summary: India's benchmark bond faced a dramatic decline, its most significant drop in over three months, primarily driven by a surge in oil prices linked to geopolitical tensions. This alarming rise in crude prices threatens India's economic growth and inflation forecast, leading to a substantial uptick in bond yields and swap rates. Despite these challenges, foreign investors remain consistently interested in India's debt markets.

trichy.title: In Karur, where there was no way out

As the chief of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam party arrived hours late, the crowd swelled and surged towards his vehicle, triggering a stampede that killed 41 people and injured over 100. C. world.summary: Iran's new supreme leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, has yet to make an appearance in the funeral ceremonies, which are unfolding over several days. He is believed to be in hiding after reportedly being wounded in the airstrike that killed his father

business.title: Heritage Foods responds to FSSAI notice on ‘fresh paneer’ claim
business.summary: The Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) recently issued a notice to the Hyderabad-based company regarding “misleading claims” regarding its product ‘Fresh Paneer’.

business.title: Airlines seek GST on ATF at 5% with full tax credit to help cut costs
business.summary: FIA urges Centre to scrap excise, State VAT on jet fuel, says move could help improve affordability

business.title: HSBC drops 'overweight' call on EM equities on AI spending fears
business.summary: HSBC has reassessed its position on emerging markets equities, shifting to an 'overweight' stance due to rising volatility in Asian markets and ongoing concerns about AI-related expenditures. South Korean stocks have notably suffered, dipping into bear market conditions. Investors are growing wary of the sustainability of AI investments backed by debt. Meanwhile, HSBC has raised the rating on eurozone equities to 'overweight,' highlighting favorable market factors.

business.title: EPFO shifts to national database; 8.25% PF interest to reflect online by July 15
business.summary: EPFO’s digital transformation will support future UPI withdrawals and faster processing of PF interest and claims

business.title: Quote of the day by Henry Singleton: "Our accounting is set to maximize cash flow, not reported earnings. Smoothing reported earnings just has to take a backseat"
business.summary: Henry Singleton emphasized cash flow over reported earnings for business success. Sustainable businesses generate strong cash, not just accounting profits. Management should focus on economic value, not quarterly earnings targets. Investors gain deeper insights by examining operating and free cash flow. Cash generation remains the essential lifeblood of any business.

business.title: Opportunity worth $35 bn for medtech sector in India by 2030: Bain & Co
business.summary: India's medical device exports reached $4 billion in FY25, while imports of high-end medical devices stood at $5.5 billion, highlighting the next opportunity for innovation

business.title: Nuvama, Cushman & Wakefield-backed realty fund raises Rs 4,000 cr
business.summary: The NCW real estate fund has triumphant news as it successfully closes its PRIME Offices Fund at a hefty Rs 4,000 crore. This collaboration between Nuvama and Cushman & Wakefield has not only met but exceeded its initial fundraising goal. With 45% of its capital already allocated to office properties, the fund will enhance access for Indian investors to premium commercial office spaces in key metropolitan areas.

business.title: Dow Jones| Nasdaq | US Stock Market Today | Live: US stock futures tumble as Trump says Iran deal is 'over', oil climbs
India's 10-year bond logs worst day in 3 months on faltering Iran deal
business.summary: India's benchmark bond faced a dramatic decline, its most significant drop in over three months, primarily driven by a surge in oil prices linked to geopolitical tensions. This alarming rise in crude prices threatens India's economic growth and inflation forecast, leading to a substantial uptick in bond yields and swap rates. Despite these challenges, foreign investors remain consistently interested in India's debt markets.

business.title: Sun Mobility t3-55T electric trucks with world’s first modular battery swapping at Pravaas 5.0
business.summary: Unlike passenger cars, commercial vehicles are judged primarily on operating economics rather than technology. Sun Mobility is betting that battery swapping can tip that equation by cutting upfront vehicle costs, reducing charging downtime and creating a shared energy network that multiple truck and bus manufacturers can use. Backed by a $78 million IndoFast-IOCL joint venture, the companyAIS-038-certified platform aims to cut upfront vehicle costs by about 40 per cent and address one of the biggest barriers to commercial EV adoption.

business.title: EPFO processing interest payment on provident funds for FY26; members can check updates by next week
business.summary: Last month, the government approved the 8.25% interest payment on provident funds

business.title: MAHE and Novo Nordisk GBS expand collaboration in pharmacometrics
business.summary: Novo Nordisk GBS will provide financial support of ₹1.75 crore over five years to enhance specialised talent development, research capacity and advanced infrastructure in quantitative drug development.

business.title: Sebi amends rule for foreign investors, directs registration fee payment in Indian rupee
business.summary: Sebi has announced a modification to its foreign investor registration fees, shifting to a rupee-based model effective in six months. This adjustment stipulates that Category-I FPIs and FVCIs will be required to pay Rs 2.3 lakh. Additionally, the common application will now demand the date of birth from applicants, and depository participants must ensure that all fees are forwarded to Sebi within a five-day period.

business.title: GJEPC prepares ground for FTA with UK from July 15
business.summary: GJEPC estimates that India’s gem and jewellery exports to the UK can more than triple from $2.5 billion to $7 billion over the coming years on the back of bilateral trade

business.title: Crude oil prices jump 6%, hit two-week high after Trump says Iran peace deal is ‘over’. What are experts saying?
business.summary: Crude oil prices rose sharply on Wednesday to a two-week high after Donald Trump declared the Iran peace agreement "over", reviving fears of fresh supply disruptions from the Middle East. Analysts say concerns over the Strait of Hormuz, tighter sanctions and depleted inventories could keep oil prices elevated in the near term.

business.title: Maharashtra to legalise bike taxis from Aug. 1; permits only for domicile holders
business.summary: Maharashtra will allow bike taxis to operate from August 1 under a new policy that restricts permits to domicile holders who can understand Marathi, marking a major shift in the state’s approach to app-based two-wheeler ride services. The policy aims to regulate an estimated 4-4.5 lakh illegal bike taxis, create local employment and generate revenue through a ₹5 daily permit fee and a 2 per cent levy on every ride for a driver welfare fund.

business.title: Torrent Pharma among 6 stocks to hit 52-week highs & rally up to 25% in a month
business.summary: Despite a sharp sell-off in the broader market, six BSE 200 stocks touched fresh 52-week highs, highlighting resilient investor confidence. The outperformers from retail, pharmaceuticals and energy sectors continued to show strong momentum, signalling sustained buying interest despite market volatility.

business.title: Recurving monsoon ‘low’ to swing rain belt to East, North-East India
business.summary: Monstrous Pacific typhoon Bavi is pulling at monsoon’s strings; heavy rainfall set to shift towards northern and eastern parts of the country

business.title: Cult. Fit IPO: Actor Hrithik Roshan set to sell 6.33 lakh shares in Rs 3,500-4,000-crore offer
business.summary: Actor Hrithik Roshan plans to sell shares in Cult. Fit's upcoming public offering. The company aims to raise Rs 3,500-4,000 crore through its initial public offering. This IPO includes a fresh issue and an offer for sale by existing investors.

business.title: Rupee slumps to one-month low as oil soars after Trump says Iran deal is 'over'
business.summary: The Indian rupee fell to its weakest level in nearly a month on Wednesday. This decline occurred after U.S. President Donald Trump stated the interim accord with Iran was over. Oil prices jumped significantly, renewing fears of Middle East supply disruptions. Indian stocks also dropped sharply, their steepest fall in over three months. Elevated oil prices are expected to pressure the rupee and slow economic growth.

business.title: US futures tumble as Trump says Iran deal is 'over'; oil climbs
business.summary: On Wednesday morning, U.S. stock futures took a significant hit as President Donald Trump declared the memorandum of understanding with Iran null and void. This announcement sparked a notable rise in oil prices, leading to a boost in energy stocks during premarket trading. Meanwhile, investors await the release of the minutes from the U.S. Federal Reserve meeting for further insights.

business.title: Women investors account for over 13% of crypto futures traders; XRP and Bitcoin top their portfolios
business.summary: Crypto futures trading in India saw significant growth from smaller cities. Women traders showed lower leverage and preferred specific digital assets. Bitcoin and Ethereum comprised a smaller portion of futures volume. Tamil Nadu led regional participation in crypto futures trading. Traders demonstrated tactical approaches and risk awareness in leveraged products.

business.title: Global Market: European shares decline as Middle East tensions weigh; airlines, autos lead losses

Airline, banking and auto stocks led the losses, although select technology names and Swedish broadband provider Bahnhof outperformed.
